title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0126 2-5 Highland, Clifton, Bristol, BS8 2YB
body: "Type of application:  Planning Permission and for relevant demolition of an unlisted building in a conservation area  Applicant name:  Mr R Tebby  Site address:  2-5 Highland, Clifton, Bristol, BS8 2YB  Description of proposed development:  Demolition of buildings and clearance of site, redevelopment with a retained 4-bed HMO and 4no. Use class flats in a 3-storey building. Altered access and provision of refuse and cycle storage.  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 25 September 2025   Date by when representations must be made 30 October 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 20 November 2025   Decision date 18 November 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 195 KB, 11 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 30 October 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0126 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     1734 L 41 Existing West Elevation  (PDF, 112 KB, 1 page)  1734 L 42 Existing North Elevation  (PDF, 110 KB, 1 page)  1734 L 43 Existing South Elevation  (PDF, 139 KB, 1 page)  1734 L 50A Proposed Site Plan  (PDF, 125 KB, 1 page)  1734 L 51D Proposed Ground Floor Plan  (PDF, 175 KB, 1 page)  1734 L 52B Proposed First Floor Plan  (PDF, 141 KB, 1 page)  1734 L 55A Proposed Roof Plan  (PDF, 119 KB, 1 page)  1734 L 60B Proposed East Elevation  (PDF, 176 KB, 1 page)  1734 L 61B Proposed West Elevation  (PDF,...
